name: Maple Pecan Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously butter a 10-inch-diameter cake pan with high sides or a 7 1/2 x 11 1/2 inch ovenproof glass baking dish.
2. Heat syrup, 1/4 cup butter, brown sugar, and mace in a heavy medium saucepan over low heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves. Bring to boil.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and sprinkle with pecans.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F and position the rack in the center.
5. In a bowl, sift flour, baking soda, and salt.
6. Cream 1/2 cup butter until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
7. Add sugar, beating until light and fluffy. Beat in eggs one at a time, then beat for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Blend in vanilla and lemon peel.
9. Alternately stir in the flour mixture and yogurt, beginning and ending with the flour mixture.
10. Fold in currants.
11. Spoon batter over the pecan mixture and spread gently to the sides of the pan.
12. Bake until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean, about 55 minutes.
13. Immediately invert the cake onto a rack set over waxed paper.
14. Serve warm with garnish of whipped cream if desired.
